ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of holding onto a tram's handrail, conveying a sense of movement and anticipation. The robot's arms will mimic the posture of someone gripping a rail while standing on a moving vehicle. To achieve this, I'll use a combination of joint rotations and slight wrist adjustments to create a natural and believable posture. The sequence will begin with the arms slightly raised and angled forward, then transition to a more secure grip, and finally relax slightly as the 'ride' continues.  The left and right arms will move in a coordinated manner, slightly offset to reflect the asymmetrical nature of holding onto a rail.

frames.beat: arms reach forward, gripping an imaginary rail
arms pull back slightly, bracing for movement
a slight adjustment, finding a comfortable hold
arms relax into the steady rhythm of the tram
